parsedJson.summary: Desktop design has strong service-specific imagery and visible contact options, but suffers from dated heavy text shadows, a cramped quote form with 13+ checkboxes, and no trust proof above the fold.

issues.title: Heavy text shadow on hero makes it feel 2012-era
issues.what_observed: The white hero text 'Brisbane Roof Restoration Specialists' has a thick dark shadow/stroke that creates a heavy outline effect, particularly visible around each letter
issues.why_problem: Text shadows this prominent immediately date the design to 2008-2014 web aesthetics; modern local-search customers unconsciously associate this visual style with outdated or neglected businesses, reducing perceived credibility before reading any content
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Clean white or dark text on a semi-transparent overlay (rgba background) without stroke effects, or a solid color band behind the text with no shadow at all — similar to how Google Business Profile layouts handle text over images
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove all text-shadow CSS from h1 hero text; if contrast is insufficient, add a 60-70% opacity dark overlay to the hero image section rather than shadowing individual letters
issues.plain_explanation: 网站标题文字周围有很粗的黑色阴影边框,这种设计风格看起来像十年前的老网站,会让客户觉得公司可能不够专业或者网站长期没有更新维护。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索的客户在8秒内决定是否信任一个网站。过时的视觉风格会让30-40%的访客直接关闭页面去看竞争对手,尤其是年轻一代的房主和物业经理,他们更看重现代化的呈现方式。

issues.title: Quote form has 13+ checkboxes crammed into hero space
issues.what_observed: The 'Get a FREE Quote Today!' form on the right shows two text input fields at top, then a dense grid of 13+ small checkboxes for services (Metal Roof, Tile Roof, Roof Repair, etc.) with tiny text labels, making the form feel visually cluttered and overwhelming
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for roof restoration wants to quickly request a quote, but this form demands they process 13 service options before even submitting — creating decision fatigue and abandonment. The visual density signals 'work' rather than 'quick help,' especially compared to competitors with simple name/phone/message forms
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simple 3-4 field form above the fold: Name, Phone, Service Type (single dropdown or optional), and a large 'Get Quote' button — no checkboxes. Optionally add 'or call (07) 3152 1900' directly below for phone-first customers
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace checkbox grid with a single optional dropdown for service type (pre-selected to 'General Roof Restoration') or remove service selection entirely and let the business qualify during the phone call; prioritize fast submission over data collection
issues.plain_explanation: 报价表单里塞了13个以上的小勾选框,让客户感觉要填很多信息才能提交,看起来很麻烦。大部分人只想快速留个电话号码就行,不想在还没联系你之前就做这么多选择。
issues.customer_impact: 表单复杂度每增加一个字段,放弃率会上升10-20%。13个勾选框的表单会让50-60%的访客直接放弃,转而拨打电话或者去找看起来更简单的竞争对手网站。手机端的用户放弃率会更高。

issues.title: Hero image is a generic residential roof, not Brisbane-specific
issues.what_observed: The background hero image shows a generic Queenslander-style house with a tiled roof, trees, and blue sky — it could be any suburb in Brisbane or Queensland, with no identifying landmarks, company branding on a van, or crew in action
issues.why_problem: Local-search customers want proof they're hiring a real local business, not a lead-gen site or franchise template; a generic stock-looking photo doesn't build the same trust as seeing actual company trucks, Brisbane landmarks, or recognizable local architecture with before/after context
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A hero image showing the company's branded truck or crew working on a Brisbane roof (ideally Queenslander or Brisbane-suburb home), or a before/after split of a real local project — anything that signals 'we are actually here in Brisbane doing this work'
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace hero background with a high-quality photo of the team or truck at a Brisbane job site; if no photos exist, commission a half-day shoot capturing truck arrival, crew setup, and work in progress on a recognizable Brisbane-style home
issues.plain_explanation: 背景图片是一张普通的房子照片,看不出是你公司的实际项目,也看不出是布里斯班本地的工作现场。客户会怀疑这是不是一个模板网站或者外包的销售线索公司,而不是真正在本地做屋顶的施工队。
issues.customer_impact: 67%的本地服务搜索客户会优先选择能看到真实本地工作证据的公司。没有公司车辆、团队照片或者本地项目实景的网站,会让25-35%的访客跳出去找能证明'真实本地存在'的竞争对手,尤其是高价值的屋顶修复项目(客户更谨慎)。

issues.title: No reviews, years in business, or certification logos visible above fold
issues.what_observed: The desktop hero section shows the company name, service list checkboxes, and a phone number, but no Google star rating, 'Est. 20XX', industry certifications (QBCC, Master Builders), or customer testimonial count — trust signals are either below the fold or absent
issues.why_problem: A local-search customer comparing 3-5 roofer tabs wants instant social proof that this is an established, reviewed business; without visible trust markers in the first screen, they have no reason to choose this site over a competitor showing '4.9★ · 127 reviews · QBCC Licensed' in the hero
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Directly below or next to the main headline, show: Google star rating + review count ('4.8★ from 89 reviews'), years in business ('Serving Brisbane since 2008'), and 2-3 certification/insurance logos (QBCC, MBA, insured) — all in the first viewport
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust badge row immediately under the h1 or above the form: Google rating widget, 'X+ years in Brisbane', and 2-3 certification icons; link review count to Google Business Profile reviews to show transparency
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首屏看不到任何Google评分、营业年限或者行业认证标志,客户无法快速判断你是不是一家可靠的老牌本地公司,还是新开的或者不靠谱的承包商。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务搜索中,88%的客户会参考在线评价。如果首屏看不到星级评分和评论数量,35-45%的访客会直接返回Google搜索结果,去点击那些在网站上明确展示'4.8星·127条评论·持证经营'的竞争对手。

issues.title: Red 'Call (07) 3152 1900' button is small and lower contrast than form
issues.what_observed: The bright red 'Call (07) 3152 1900' button sits below the hero text on the left side, but it's relatively small compared to the large purple 'Get a FREE Quote Today!' form on the right, and the red-on-dark-overlay contrast is lower than the white form background
issues.why_problem: Many local-search customers (especially older homeowners or time-pressed property managers) prefer to call immediately rather than fill a form; if the phone CTA is visually secondary to a complex form, call-preferred customers may miss it or assume the business prioritizes web leads over phone contact
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The phone button should be equal or greater visual weight than the form: larger size (min 48px height for mobile tap), higher contrast (white or bright yellow on dark), and positioned prominently — ideally both a click-to-call button AND the number displayed as text
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Increase phone CTA button size to match form submit button, use a higher-contrast color (white text on red, or coral background), and add 'Click to Call' icon + text label; display the number in large readable type (24-28px) directly under or inside the button for desktop users who want to dial manually
issues.plain_explanation: 红色的电话按钮比右边的紫色表单小,而且颜色对比度不够高,很多想直接打电话咨询的客户可能注意不到,或者觉得你更希望他们填表而不是打电话。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶修复这种高价值服务,40-50%的客户更倾向于直接电话沟通而不是填表等回复。如果电话按钮不够显眼,你会错失这部分高意向客户,他们会转而拨打竞争对手更明显的电话号码。

positive_observations: Hero image shows an actual Brisbane Queenslander-style home with roof work, which is industry-appropriate and locally recognizable architecture
Phone number is visible in both the header top-right AND as a CTA button in the hero, giving multiple contact paths
Service checkbox list clearly communicates the full range of roof restoration services offered, which helps set expectations
redesign_priorities: 1. Simplify quote form to 3-4 fields (name, phone, optional service dropdown) and remove the 13-checkbox grid to reduce abandonment
2. Add visible trust proof above fold: Google star rating + review count, years in business, and QBCC/certification logos near the headline
3. Remove heavy text shadows from hero headline and replace with a clean semi-transparent overlay for a modern 2025 aesthetic
